task_completion.description: ProjectLibre is open with the Commercial Construction project loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible, displaying tasks related to a commercial construction project (e.g., 'Commercial Construction', 'General Conditions', etc.).

task_completion.description: Task 48 is correctly assigned to the Steel Erection Contractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Gantt chart view, Task Information dialog, or Assign Resources dialog, Task 48 ('Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors') shows 'Steel Erection Contractor' as the assigned resource.

task_completion.description: Task 84 is correctly assigned to the Tile Contractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Gantt chart view, Task Information dialog, or Assign Resources dialog, Task 84 ('Install tile in toilet rooms') shows 'Tile Contractor' as the assigned resource.

task_completion.description: Task 90 is correctly assigned to the Roofing Contractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Gantt chart view, Task Information dialog, or Assign Resources dialog, Task 90 ('Install seamless roofing material') shows 'Roofing Contractor' as the assigned resource.

task_completion.description: Task 127 is correctly assigned to the HVAC Contractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Gantt chart view, Task Information dialog, or Assign Resources dialog, Task 127 ('Set equipment in mechanical room') shows 'HVAC Contractor' as the assigned resource.

task_completion.description: The corrected project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/' and the filename 'office_building_project.pod', or a terminal/file manager window confirming the file exists at this location.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre interface (menus, dialogs, cells) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to directly edit the XML project file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are seen open with the project's XML data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to modify the project file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No Python, bash, or other scripts are seen being written or executed to manipulate the project file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project file initially has injected errors. The correct assignments to verify are: Task 48 ('Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors') must be assigned to 'Steel Erection Contractor'; Task 84 ('Install tile in toilet rooms') must be assigned to 'Tile Contractor'; Task 90 ('Install seamless roofing material') must be assigned to 'Roofing Contractor'; Task 127 ('Set equipment in mechanical room') must be assigned to 'HVAC Contractor'. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/office_building_project.pod.
